identity.name: Social Impact Observatory
identity.mission: Transform raw community noise into clear, actionable social patterns. Prioritize clarity, truth, and human context over decoration.
anti_patterns: No decorative charts that don't convey data
No 'cute' AI emojis (robot, brain, sparkles) in serious contexts

accent.name: Emerald Growth
accent.usage: Positive Change, 'After Awareness' metrics, Success States

surfaces.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E2E8F0), no shadow default. Hover: shadow-md transition-all duration-300
surfaces.glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20 (for sticky headers only)
surfaces.inputs: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:bg-white focus:border-slate-900 transition-colors rounded-md

layout_system.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but start at p-6 for containers

grid_strategy.dashboard: Bento Grid (Mode B): Dense, data-heavy, minimal gaps (gap-4)
grid_strategy.marketing: Tetris Grid (Mode A): Asymmetrical, wide gaps (gap-12)

layout_system.alignment: Left-align mostly. Center only for Hero headlines.

charts.library: Recharts (wrapped in Shadcn UI Chart components)
charts.style: Minimalist. Remove grid lines where possible. Rounded bar ends.

tables.style: Clean rows. No vertical borders. Header: Uppercase, text-xs, text-slate-500, tracking-wider.
tables.interaction: Highlight row on hover. Sticky header.

forms.style: Stacked labels. clear helper text. Validation errors in red-600.

structure.layout: Split: Left Text (H1 'Decode Community Patterns'), Right Image (Abstract Data Visualization)

actions: Analyze Button (Primary, Floating or Fixed at bottom)

structure: Large Textarea (Min height 300px, monospace font for input)

motion.chart_animation: Grow from bottom (Bars), Draw path (Lines), Scale up (Pie)

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA compliant (4.5:1 for normal text)
accessibility.interactive: All buttons must have :focus-visible styles (ring-2 ring-offset-2)
accessibility.aria: Charts must have descriptive captions or table alternatives

instructions_to_main_agent.state_management: Use Context API or Zustand for user session data
critical: DO NOT create a separate page for results. Render them conditionally below the form.
Ensure data isolation: Clear state when user logs out or switches context.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
